narrative:
Galion 3B (precinct in Crawford County) has 864 registered voters, with 66.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
